summary: App with a hub page that includes task posting functionality via a floating action button.

existing_features.title: Wire the floating action button (FAB) in the bottom-right corner of HubView so that clicking it opens the PostTaskModal for authenticated users who have a profile. If the user is not authenticated or has no profile, trigger the existing auth/profile prompt flow (matching the behaviour already used by TaskCard clicks).

new_feature_requests.summary: Make the plus button (bottom-right FAB) on the hub page functional so users can post a task
